headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: "Obsession" Tops Today's Trending, New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《鬼上车》等剧集热度高涨。本周《福尔摩斯小姐3》《穿普拉达的女王2》等续集备受期待。
summaryEn: No movies released today, but shows like "Obsession" and "Ghost Ride" are trending. Sequels like "Enola Holmes 3" and "The Devil Wears Prada 2" are highly anticipated this week.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》定档，蜘蛛侠新作引期待
industryHighlights.en: "Avatar: The Last Airbender" sets date, new Spider-Man excites fans

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人6》恐怖回归，定档下半年
industryHighlights.en: "Evil Dead 6" returns to horror, set for later this year

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》本周热搜攀升
industryHighlights.en: "Minions and Monsters" rises in weekly trending
